Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Yeah, keep your hands off our girlfriends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}All I've been hearing her talk about is "Ryoji-kun {f 1 3 132}"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Y-Yeah, you need to stop talking to every girl you see...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I actually have no idea which girls you're talking about. There's been too many that have come up to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But I haven't made any moves on anyone. I just invited them out for a bite to eat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}That's exactly what we call making a move![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I've made a promise to go out with them. I can't just cancel due to my inconvenience...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ryoji could get in danger if this continues...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should probably intervene...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Gimme your phone! I'm gonna delete all the contact info you have![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}...Who the hell are you? This is none of your business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Are you taking his side?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}I heard he's friends with Sanada-senpai and the student council president... They live in the same dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Wh-What do we do? If he tells them, then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Look, just stay the hell away from our girlfriends and delete 'em from your contacts, got it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Better watch out, or he'll steal your girlfriend too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Sorry... I didn't mean to make trouble for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Hmm... Guess so, huh. I really didn't expect them to be so angry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Haha, is that what you call it? That wasn't really my intention...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}No... Considering how angry they were, I'd say I probably was at fault here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}From now on, I will ask if they have a boyfriend first before inviting them out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}What a great view... The ocean looks so beautiful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I do like seeing it from the monorail to school each morning, but it looks so different from up here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}If you're in a relationship with someone, that means you like each other, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I don't think me getting in the picture would change that, would it...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I wonder what it means to like someone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Is it anybody I know? I wonder what you two talk about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'm sure you'll find someone like that before long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Well, maybe you can tell me once we get to know each other better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I guess there's still a lot that I don't understand...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Look at the world out there, the people in this city, our classmates in school, and you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}All right, since I dragged you into this mess today, let me make it up to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'll treat you to ramen. I just had some with Junpei-kun the other day.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}And while we're at it, maybe you can show me around town? I'd like to know what kind of places you like going to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent some time with Ryoji,[n]then returned to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I understand[n]him a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All stats of the equipped Persona have been raised by 1.[n]{f 1 1}
